world_english_bible_web: In the beginning God{After "God," the Hebrew has the two letters "Aleph Tav" (the first and last letters of the Hebrew alphabet) as a grammatical marker.} created the heavens and the earth.
king_james_bible_kjv: In the beginning God created the heaven and the earth.
leningrad_codex: בְּרֵאשִׁית בָּרָא אֱלֹהִים אֵת הַשָּׁמַיִם וְאֵת הָאָרֶץ׃ ‬
jewish_publication_society_jps: In the beginning God created the heaven and the earth.
codex_alexandrinus: ἐν ἀρχῇ ἐποίησεν ὁ θεὸς τὸν οὐρανὸν καὶ τὴν γῆν
brenton: In the beginning God made the heaven and the earth.
samaritan_pentateuch: בראשית ברא אלהים את השמים ואת הארץ
samaritan_pentateuch_english: In the beginning God created the heaven and the earth.
onkelos_aramaic: בְּקַדְמִין בְּרָא יְיָ יָת שְׁמַיָּא וְיָת אַרְעָא
onkelos_english: In the first times the Lord created the heavens and the earth.

world_english_bible_web: Now the earth was formless and empty.  Darkness was on the surface of the deep.  God's Spirit was hovering over the surface of the waters.
king_james_bible_kjv: And the earth was without form, and void; and darkness was upon the face of the deep. And the Spirit of God moved upon the face of the waters.
leningrad_codex: וְהָאָרֶץ הָיְתָה תֹהוּ וָבֹהוּ וְחֹשֶׁךְ עַל־פְּנֵי תְהוֹם וְרוּחַ אֱלֹהִים מְרַחֶפֶת עַל־פְּנֵי הַמָּיִם׃ ‬
jewish_publication_society_jps: Now the earth was unformed and void, and darkness was upon the face of the deep; and the spirit of God hovered over the face of the waters.
codex_alexandrinus: ἡ δὲ γῆ ἦν ἀόρατος καὶ ἀκατασκεύαστος καὶ σκότος ἐπάνω τῆς ἀβύσσου καὶ πνεῦμα θεοῦ ἐπεφέρετο ἐπάνω τοῦ ὕδατος
brenton: But the earth was unsightly and unfurnished, and darkness was over the deep, and the Spirit of God moved over the water.
samaritan_pentateuch: והארץ היתה תהו ובהו וחשך על פני תהום ורוח אלהים מרחפת על פני המים
samaritan_pentateuch_english: And the earth was without form, and void; and darkness [was] upon the face of the deep. And the Spirit of God moved upon the face of the waters.
onkelos_aramaic: וְאַרְעָא הֲוַת צָדְיָא וְרֵיקַנְיָא וַחֲשׁוֹכָא פָּרַשׂ עַל אַפֵּי תְהוֹמָא וְרוּחָא מִן קֳדָם יְיָ מְנַשְּׁבָא עַל אַפֵּי מַיָּא
onkelos_english: And the earth was waste and empty, and darkness was upon the face of the abyss; and a wind from before the Lord blew upon the face of the waters.

world_english_bible_web: God said, "Let there be light," and there was light.
king_james_bible_kjv: And God said, Let there be light: and there was light.
jewish_publication_society_jps: And God said: "Let there be light." And there was light.
codex_alexandrinus: καὶ εἶπεν ὁ θεός γενηθήτω φῶς καὶ ἐγένετο φῶς
brenton: And God said, Let there be light, and there was light.
samaritan_pentateuch: ויאמר אלהים יהי אור ויהי אור
samaritan_pentateuch_english: And God said, Let there be light: and there was light.
onkelos_aramaic: וַאֲמַר יְיָ יְהֵי נְהוֹרָא וַהֲוָה נְהוֹרָא
onkelos_english: And the Lord said, Let there be light; and there was light.

world_english_bible_web: God saw the light, and saw that it was good.  God divided the light from the darkness.
king_james_bible_kjv: And God saw the light, that it was good: and God divided the light from the darkness.
leningrad_codex: וַיַּרְא אֱלֹהִים אֶת־הָאוֹר כִּי־טוֹב וַיַּבְדֵּל אֱלֹהִים בֵּין הָאוֹר וּבֵין הַחֹשֶׁךְ׃ ‬
jewish_publication_society_jps: And God saw the light, that it was good; and God divided the light from the darkness.
codex_alexandrinus: καὶ εἶδεν ὁ θεὸς τὸ φῶς ὅτι καλόν καὶ διεχώρισεν ὁ θεὸς ἀνὰ μέσον τοῦ φωτὸς καὶ ἀνὰ μέσον τοῦ σκότους
brenton: And God saw the light that it was good, and God divided between the light and the darkness.
samaritan_pentateuch: וירא אלהים את האור כי טוב ויבדל אלהים בין האור ובין החשך
samaritan_pentateuch_english: And God saw the light, that [it was] good: and God divided the light from the darkness.
onkelos_aramaic: וַחֲזָא יְיָ יָת נְהוֹרָא אֲרֵי טָב וְאַפְרֵשׁ יְיָ בֵּין נְהוֹרָא וּבֵין חֲשׁוֹכָא
onkelos_english: And the Lord saw the light that it was good. And the Lord distinguished between the light and between the darkness.
